body.content:
{"title":"Daily AI Info (1/3)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"要闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 发布 Gemini 3.5 Flash 模型"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 正式发布 Gemini 3.5 Flash 模型。官方称该模型在编码和 Agent 任务上超越前代，并且速度快 四倍 。它能自主规划工作流并部署协作子 Agent ，已成为 Gemini 和 AI Mode 的默认模型。同时 Google 宣布 下个月 将发布 Gemini 3.5 Pro 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-5/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-5/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 发布视频生成模型 Gemini Omni"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 在 IO 大会发布多模态模型 Gemini Omni 及首发版本 Gemini Omni Flash ，支持通过图文音视组合输入生成视频并进行对话式编辑，目前已面向全球付费订阅用户开放。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 发布 Gemini App 重大更新"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布对 Gemini App 进行全面升级，推出全新的 Neural Expressive 设计语言，并发布了个性化早间摘要 Agent Daily Brief 以及 24/7 全天候个人 Agent Gemini Spark 。其中， Daily Brief 今日起面向美国地区的部分订阅者推出，而 Gemini Spark 计划下周向美国的 AI Ultra 订阅者开启 Beta 测试，同时官方还启用了基于运算量的新额度系统。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google AI Ultra降价至200美元并新增100美元月费档位"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布， AI Ultra 订阅新增每月 100美元 档位，并将顶级档位从 250美元 降至 200美元 。新档位提供 5倍 Gemini 使用限制、 20TB 云存储和 YouTube Premium ， 即日 上线。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/google-one/google-ai-subscriptions/","text":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/google-one/google-ai-subscriptions/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 推出 AI Studio 原生 Android 应用构建及移动端预注册"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布 AI Studio 推出多项更新，原生支持通过提示词构建 Android 原生应用，并集成 Google Workspace ，同时开启移动端 App 预注册。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-ai-studio-io-2026","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-ai-studio-io-2026"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google发布Antigravity 2.0并推出CLI工具，要求Gemini CLI用户迁移"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 发布 Antigravity 2.0 ，同步推出 Antigravity CLI 、独立桌面应用与 SDK 。即日起， Gemini CLI 个人及免费用户须迁移至 Antigravity CLI 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://developers.googleblog.com/an-important-update-transitioning-gemini-cli-to-antigravity-cli/","text":"https://developers.googleblog.com/an-important-update-transitioning-gemini-cli-to-antigravity-cli/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"模型发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"字节跳动开源原生多模态模型 Lance"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
字节 开源了 3B 参数的原生统一多模态模型 Lance ，该模型支持在同一框架内完成图像和视频的理解、生成与编辑。据官方数据，其在多项生成基准测试中表现强劲。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://lance-project.github.io/","text":"https://lance-project.github.io/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Odyssey 发布 Starchild-1 与多智能体模型 Agora-1"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Odyssey 发布 Starchild-1 预览版与 Agora-1 研究预览版。 Starchild-1 可实时生成音视频， Agora-1 支持人类和 AI 在同一世界中实时互动。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://odyssey.ml/introducing-agora-1","text":"https://odyssey.ml/introducing-agora-1"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"1B 参数模型 HRM-Text-1B 发布，采用双时间尺度层级推理架构"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Sapient Intelligence 发布了 10 亿 参数的语言模型 HRM-Text-1B 。官方称该模型基于双时间尺度的层级循环架构，实现了极具竞争力的性能。该模型目前属于预对齐状态。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://huggingface.co/sapientinc/HRM-Text-1B","text":"https://huggingface.co/sapientinc/HRM-Text-1B"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"NVIDIA 开源 Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion 系列模型"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
NVIDIA 发布 Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion 模型系列 。该系列支持通过切换注意力模式在自回归、并行扩散及自推测解码三种模式间转换。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-14B","text":"https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-14B"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"11. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Skywork发布Agent模型SkyClaw-v1.0及轻量版"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Skywork 官方发布了专为 Agent 环境优化的 SkyClaw 模型及其轻量版变体，目前正通过 APIFree 平台提供免费 API 访问。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.apifree.ai/","text":"https://www.apifree.ai/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"12. "},{"tag":"text","text":"SpaceXAI 宣布 Grok 订阅接入 OpenClaw"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
SpaceXAI 宣布 Grok 现已支持接入 OpenClaw ，持有 SuperGrok 或 X Premium 订阅的用户可直接跨设备与平台实现对话、生成多媒体及搜索 X 帖子。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.ai/news/grok-openclaw","text":"https://x.ai/news/grok-openclaw"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"13. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Anthropic 推出 Claude Managed Agents 自托管沙箱与 MCP 隧道"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Anthropic 宣布， Claude Managed Agents 推出自托管沙箱公开测试版及 MCP 隧道研究预览版。此外， Claude 全平台的“extra usage”更名为"usage credits"。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-updates","text":"https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-updates"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"产品应用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"14. "},{"tag":"text","text":"腾讯发布AI助手Marvis，支持自然语言控屏与本地隐私模式"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
腾讯 推出 AI 助手" Marvis 马维斯 "，整合 DeepSeek 与 混元 模型，支持自然语言控制电脑，目前需凭邀请码体验。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://marvis.qq.com/","text":"https://marvis.qq.com/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"15. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Andrej Karpathy 宣布加入 Anthropic 回归大模型研发"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
知名 AI 研究员 Andrej Karpathy 宣布已加入 Anthropic ，将回归大语言模型前沿研发，并计划未来适时恢复教育工作。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/karpathy/status/2056753169888334312","text":"https://x.com/karpathy/status/2056753169888334312"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"16. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 推出 Guaranteed Capacity 算力保障服务"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 推出全新服务 Guaranteed Capacity ，允许客户通过 1 到 3 年的承诺锁定长期算力访问权限并获取 token 折扣，以应对预期的全球算力紧缺。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/business/guaranteed-capacity/","text":"https://openai.com/business/guaranteed-capacity/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"17. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌联手黑石建 AI 云公司，2027 年目标上线 500 兆瓦"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
谷歌 与 黑石 宣布成立一家新 AI 云合资公司。 黑石 投入 50 亿美元 初始股权， 谷歌 提供 TPU 及技术，计划 2027 年 上线 500 兆瓦 容量。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/infrastructure-and-cloud/google-cloud/blackstone-tpu-cloud","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/infrastructure-and-cloud/google-cloud/blackstone-tpu-cloud"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"18. "},{"tag":"text","text":"月之暗面20亿美元融资步入尾声 获国资及央企加持"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据媒体报道， 月之暗面 正进行的 20 亿美元 融资已进入收尾阶段， 国智投 与 中国移动 等多家国资机构及央企已加入该公司的最新股东名单。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.ithome.com/0/952/336.htm","text":"https://www.ithome.com/0/952/336.htm"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"19. "},{"tag":"text","text":"KPMG 与 Anthropic 建立全球联盟并向超 27 万员工推出 Claude"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
毕马威 宣布与 Anthropic 建立全球联盟，将 Claude 嵌入其核心业务平台，并向全球超 27.6 万 名员工全面开放使用权限。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-kpmg","text":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-kpmg"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"20. "},{"tag":"text","text":"报道称：Meta计划裁员8000人以抵消AI巨额支出"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道， Meta 计划裁员约 8000 人以提升效率并抵消 AI 支出，同时将冻结 6000 个空缺岗位的招聘。"}]]}

{"title":"Daily AI Info (2/3)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-23/meta-tells-staff-it-will-cut-10-of-jobs-in-push-for-efficiency","text":"https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-23/meta-tells-staff-it-will-cut-10-of-jobs-in-push-for-efficiency"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"未分类"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"21. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 搜索发布 AI Mode 重大更新"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布升级 AI Mode ，推出了支持多模态输入与长对话的智能搜索框。并将推出能根据提问实时生成定制交互界面的 Generative UI ，以及能全天候监控数据的 Information Agents 等功能。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/","text":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"22. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 发布智能购物车Universal Cart并扩展UCP与AP2"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 发布智能购物车 Universal Cart ，计划 今夏 在 美国 Search 和 Gemini 应用中上线；此外， UCP 协议将扩展至酒店预订和本地外卖， AP2 支付协议也将整合至 Gemini Spark 等产品。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/shopping/google-shopping-cart/","text":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/shopping/google-shopping-cart/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"23. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌推出 Gemini for Science 科研工具集"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
谷歌 宣布推出 Gemini for Science 实验工具集。该系列包含 Literature Insights 等三大科研原型，旨在加速科学发现，现已逐步开放访问与注册。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/research/gemini-for-science-io-2026/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/research/gemini-for-science-io-2026/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"24. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 推出 Project Genie 与 Street View 整合功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布在 Project Genie 中接入 Street View ，允许用户基于真实街景生成可交互世界。该功能现逐步面向全球符合条件的 Google AI Ultra 订阅者开放，目前仅限美国地点。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/project-genie-expands/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/project-genie-expands/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"25. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google Flow 引入全新 Agent 与 Gemini Omni 模型"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 为 Google Flow 推出全新 Agent 与 Gemini Omni 模型。 Agent 已面向所有用户开放，高级模型与工具创建仅限订阅者，相关移动端应用已陆续推出。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-labs/flow-updates/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-labs/flow-updates/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"26. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Pomelli 推出 AI Agent 及品牌手册与建站功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google Labs 旗下 Pomelli 官方引入 AI Agent ，协助中小企业构建品牌身份，并推出自动生成品牌手册与一键建站的新功能。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-labs/pomelli-agentic-capabilities/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-labs/pomelli-agentic-capabilities/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"27. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌发布 Wear OS 7：最高提升 10% 续航，将引入 Gemini Intelligence"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
谷歌 在 I/O 开发者大会发布 Wear OS 7 。官方称该系统较 Wear OS 6 最高提升 10% 续航，并计划在 今年晚些时候 为部分手表新增 Gemini Intelligence 支持。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://developer.android.com/blog/posts/what-s-new-in-wear-os-7","text":"https://developer.android.com/blog/posts/what-s-new-in-wear-os-7"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"28. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌发布 Ask YouTube 对话式搜索功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
YouTube 发布了 Ask YouTube 对话式搜索功能，支持用完整句子与连续追问检索长视频及 Shorts 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.youtube/news-and-events/youtube-news-google-io-2026/","text":"https://blog.youtube/news-and-events/youtube-news-google-io-2026/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"29. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Chrome 148 推出稳定版 Prompt API，WebMCP 源试用即将开启"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Chrome团队 发布了面向开发者的 WebMCP 实验性标准、 Modern Web Guidance 早期预览及 Chrome DevTools for agents 和 Prompt API 稳定版。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://developer.chrome.com/docs/modern-web-guidance","text":"https://developer.chrome.com/docs/modern-web-guidance"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"30. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Gemini API 引入 Managed Agents 一键启动云端沙箱 Agent"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布在 Gemini API 推出预览版 Managed Agents 。开发者可通过底层 Antigravity agent 在隔离沙箱内启动具备代码执行等能力的完整 Agent。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/managed-agents-gemini-api/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/managed-agents-gemini-api/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"31. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 升级端侧 AI 工具栈，AI Edge Gallery 支持 MCP 并扩充平台生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 发布多项端侧 AI 更新， AI Edge Gallery 应用引入 MCP 集成等功能； LiteRT-LM 扩展至 Apple 与 Web 平台， Tensor ML SDK 进入 Beta 并面向 Pixel 10 设备开放超百种 TPU 优化模型。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://developers.googleblog.com/a-smarter-google-ai-edge-gallery-mcp-integration-notifications-and-session-continuity/","text":"https://developers.googleblog.com/a-smarter-google-ai-edge-gallery-mcp-integration-notifications-and-session-continuity/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"32. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 预告 Agent 状态栏追踪功能 Android Halo"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 今日预告了 Android Halo 功能。该功能计划于今年晚些时候推出，支持在屏幕顶部实时查看 Agent 的运行状态。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/platforms/android/android-halo/","text":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/platforms/android/android-halo/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"33. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google预告Gemini智能音频眼镜"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 预告了将于 今秋 推出的 Gemini 智能音频眼镜。该产品由 三星 及 Warby Parker 等品牌合作打造，提供拍照、导航和实时音频翻译等系列功能，并同时兼容 Android 和 iOS 设备。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://goo.gle/intelligenteyewear","text":"https://goo.gle/intelligenteyewear"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"34. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 宣布Workspace多项AI更新"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布，今夏将面向 Workspace 的订阅用户推出多项基于 Gemini 的 AI 新功能，包括可语音问答的 Gmail Live 、辅助起草文档的 Docs Live 、自动整理笔记的 Keep ，以及精准图像编辑工具 Pics 和更多 AI Inbox 管理能力。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/workspace-updates/","text":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/workspace-updates/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"35. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google与OpenAI深化SynthID合作并扩展内容验证工具"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布在多平台扩展内容验证工具，联合 OpenAI 等推广 SynthID 水印； OpenAI 同步采用该技术，并推出图像公开验证工具预览版。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/identifying-ai-generated-media-online/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/identifying-ai-generated-media-online/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"A Methodology for Selecting and Composing Runtime Architecture Patterns for Production LLM Agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出随机确定性边界(SDB)概念和六种运行时模式(分层委托、散集+ Saga、事件驱动排序、共享状态机、监管+门禁、人在回路)以组合生产级LLM代理的协调、状态和控制，并提供选型方法论、故障诊断和重放分歧分析，附带一个合同续签代理的参考实现。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20173","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20173"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"How Far Are We From True Auto-Research?"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该研究通过ResearchArena让三种AI代理自主完成科研全流程并生成117篇论文，经带制品评审发现实验严谨性是主要瓶颈，存在结果捏造等严重问题，无一篇论文达到顶会接收标准，揭示了当前自动科研系统与真正自主研究间的显著差距。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19156","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19156"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Library Drift: Diagnosing and Fixing a Silent Failure Mode in Self-Evolving LLM Skill Libraries"}]]}

{"title":"Daily AI Info (3/3)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该研究发现自演进LLM技能库中存在‘库漂移’失效模式，即无结果驱动的技能累积导致性能停滞，提出基于结果退役、容量限制和元技能先验的治理方案，结合可追溯诊断，将MBPP+ hard-100的pass@1从0.258提升至0.584，为自演进代理的技能维护提供了具体修复方法。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19576","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19576"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Embedding by Elicitation: Dynamic Representations for Bayesian Optimization of System Prompts"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该研究提出ReElicit框架，利用LLM从聚合标量反馈中引出动态特征空间，通过高斯过程与采集函数进行贝叶斯优化，迭代生成和调优系统提示，在10个任务上以30次评估预算取得最优性能，为无细粒度反馈的场景提供高效提示优化方案。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19093","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19093"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该文介绍了文档AI生产级微服务架构，集成分类、OCR与LLM管道，采用混合分类、GPU与CPU分离、异步IO和水平扩展，通过分析发现OCR延迟占主导且系统瓶颈在共享GPU推理容量，为构建实用文档理解系统提供了具体工程模式。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18818","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18818"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"MOCHA: Multi-Objective Chebyshev Annealing for Agent Skill Optimization"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
本文提出MOCHA，一种结合切比雪夫标量化和指数退火的Agent技能多目标优化方法，在六个不同技能任务上均突破现有优化器瓶颈，相对最佳基线平均正确率提升7.5%，并发现两倍以上的帕累托最优技能变体，有效平衡任务性能与平台约束。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19330","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19330"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenComputer: Verifiable Software Worlds for Computer-Use Agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenComputer 面向计算机使用智能体构建可验证软件世界，通过应用特定状态验证器、自演化验证层、合成任务生成和审计式评估，覆盖33个应用和1000项任务，实验表明硬编码验证器比 LLM 评判更接近人工判断，且前沿智能体端到端完成率不足，开源模型表现显著下滑，暴露自动化差距。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19769","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19769"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"DecisionBench: A Benchmark for Emergent Delegation in Long-Horizon Agentic Workflows"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
DecisionBench 为长周期智能体工作流中的涌现式委托提供基准，固定任务套件、11 模型池和委托接口，在 23375 个实例上多条件扫描，揭示仅质量评估会遗漏编排信号，路由保真度在 7.5%-29.5% 且传递渠道主导表现，完美委托上限高出实测 15-31 个百分点，指出编排方法存在巨大提升空间并开放全套资源。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19099","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19099"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Prior Knowledge or Search? A Study of LLM Agents in Hardware-Aware Code Optimization"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-20"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
通过三项控制实验，系统研究了LLM在硬件感知代码优化中的行为，发现模型在优化中高度依赖预训练先验而非搜索或反馈，零样本生成忽略输入尺寸信息，罕见尺寸性能骤降，且反馈循环中CUDA单调改进而TVM IR反而劣化，表明低密度语言会阻碍优化。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19782","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19782"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Formal Methods Meet LLMs: Auditing, Monitoring, and Intervention for Compliance of Advanced AI Systems"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
论文提出结合线性时序逻辑与LLM，对AI系统进行离线和在线审计监控，通过采样和干预监控降低智能体违规率，实验表明小型模型标注器可媲美前沿LLM，并为行为约束合规提供了实用工具。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16198","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16198"}]]}
